title: palhinhaea reflexifolia
intro: Palhinhaea reflexifolia is a species of plant in the family Hypnaceae, commonly known as the rock fern or rock spleenwort, native to the Azores Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Palhinhaea reflexifolia include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Palhinhaea reflexifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Azores Islands.
